name: Layered Banana Pineapple Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix graham cracker crumbs, sugar and melted butter in a 13 x 9 x 2 pan.
2. Press mixture evenly onto bottom of pan.
3. Arrange banana slices on the crust.
4. Beat cream cheese until smooth in a large bowl with a wire whisk.
5. Gradually beat in cold milk.
6. Add pudding mixes to the cream cheese and milk mixture.
7. Beat until well blended and thickened.
8. Spread the pudding mixture evenly over the banana slices.
9. Spoon pineapple evenly over the pudding mixture.
10. Spread Cool Whip over the pineapple.
11. Refrigerate for 3 hours or until ready to serve.
